ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol or ticker */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" INTEGER /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "industry" INTEGER /* Industry of the company */,
  "sector" INTEGER /* Sector of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date of the stock */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "is_delisted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the stock is delisted */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the stock information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the exchange was established */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the exchange's website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "trading_hours_start" TEXT /* Start time of the trading hours */,
  "trading_hours_end" TEXT /* End time of the trading hours */,
  "trading_days" TEXT /* Days on which the exchange operates (e.g., 'Mon-Fri') */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the exchange information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent industry (for hierarchical classification) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the industry information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industries_parent_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector (for hierarchical classification) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the sector information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sectors_parent_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" INTEGER /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP or postal code of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "can_edit_data" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can edit data */,
  "can_delete_data" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can delete data */,
  "can_view_sensitive_data" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can view sensitive data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the role information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access attempt was successful */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial report */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue of the company */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the company */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend payout */,
  "cash_flow" REAL /* Cash flow from operations */,
  "gross_profit" REAL /* Gross profit of the company */,
  "operating_income" REAL /* Operating income of the company */,
  "net_debt" REAL /* Net debt of the company */,
  "eps_diluted" REAL /* Diluted earnings per share */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield as a percentage */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "pb_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-book ratio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the financial information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the indicator data */,
  "rsi" REAL /* Relative Strength Index (RSI) */,
  "macd" REAL /* Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) */,
  "macd_signal" REAL /* MACD signal line */,
  "macd_hist" REAL /* MACD histogram */,
  "adx" REAL /* Average Directional Index (ADX) */,
  "cci" REAL /* Commodity Channel Index (CCI) */,
  "bollinger_bands_upper" REAL /* Upper Bollinger Band */,
  "bollinger_bands_lower" REAL /* Lower Bollinger Band */,
  "stochastic_k" REAL /* Stochastic K value */,
  "stochastic_d" REAL /* Stochastic D value */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the technical indicator data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the news article (e.g., 'earnings', 'product launch') */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the news article (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the news article was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
